about.title: Our Story
about.heading: Skincare That Works For Every Skin.
about.story1: Niu Skin Cosmetics was founded with a simple but powerful mission: to create effective, brightening skincare that is safe for all skin tones — without bleaching agents. We believe everyone deserves healthy, radiant skin.
about.story2: Our formulations are developed in the UK using globally sourced, scientifically proven ingredients. We combine innovation with care to deliver products that genuinely work — for face care, body care, and everything in between.
about.cultureBody: At Niu Skin, we believe great skincare doesn't need to be complicated. Our products are formulated with clinically proven actives — Alpha Arbutin, Niacinamide, Vitamin C, and Hyaluronic Acid — chosen for their effectiveness and skin safety. No bleaching agents. No unnecessary fillers. Just results.
about.formulation1: Every Niu Skin product is carefully formulated to brighten and even skin tone without bleaching or darkening your complexion. We use mild, clinically validated ingredients that work with your skin — not against it.
about.formulation2: Our products are suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin, and are rigorously tested to ensure safety and efficacy. Because great skin shouldn't come with compromises.
about.sustainabilityBody: We are committed to producing skincare that is both effective and responsible. Our formulas are free from bleaching agents, harsh chemicals, and unnecessary additives. We source our ingredients with care, and our packaging is designed to reduce waste wherever possible.
about.futureBody: Niu Skin Cosmetics is growing — expanding our product range and reaching more customers across Nigeria and beyond. We are building a brand that stands for healthy, confident skin for everyone. Find us in stores across Lagos and nationwide through our authorised distributor network.

journal.title: The Journal
journal.pageSubtitle: Observations on heritage, hair architecture, botanical potency, and the quiet power of ritual.

ingredients.title: Ingredients

ingredients.pageBody: We source directly from the earth, focusing on materials revered for centuries. Explore the functional power and cultural resonance behind each element in our regimens.
ingredients.purityBody: Our formulas are painstakingly developed without synthetic fillers, artificial fragrances, or harsh sulfates.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Common questions about our products, delivery, and formulations.
faq.q1: Are Niu Skin products suitable for all skin types?
faq.a1: Yes. Niu Skin products are formulated with mild and effective non-bleaching ingredients suitable for all skin types — including oily, dry, combination, and sensitive skin.
faq.q2: Will your products bleach my skin?
faq.a2: No. Niu Skin products are formulated without any bleaching agents. They contain Alpha Arbutin, Niacinamide, and Vitamin C, which reduce melanin production gently — brightening without bleaching.
faq.q3: Will the products darken fair skin?
faq.a3: No. The products will not darken your skin. The active ingredients — Alpha Arbutin, Niacinamide, and Vitamin C — help regulate melanin production for an even, healthy complexion.
faq.a4: Lagos orders are delivered within 24 hours after confirmation via dispatch rider. Orders outside Lagos are sent via waybill to your regional motor park within 24 hours — arrival typically takes 1–4 days depending on distance.
faq.a5: Niu Skin products are formulated in the UK and produced by our production base abroad, with ingredients sourced from around the world.

shipping.title: Shipping & Delivery
shipping.subtitle: How we get your Niu Skin products to you.
shipping.section1Body: Lagos orders are delivered within 24 hours after order confirmation to your doorstep via a dispatch rider. Additional delivery fee applies based on your location within Lagos.
shipping.section2Body: Orders outside Lagos are sent via waybill to your regional motor park within 24 hours of confirmation. Arrival time varies from 1 to 4 days depending on distance. For doorstep delivery outside Lagos, please contact us at +234 906 048 6962. Additional delivery fee applies.
shipping.section3Body: Due to the personal care nature of our products, we cannot accept returns on opened products. If a product arrives damaged or you experience an adverse reaction, please contact us within 14 days of delivery. Unopened products in original packaging may be returned within 30 days for a full refund, minus return shipping costs.
shipping.section4Body: Once your order has been dispatched, you will receive a confirmation message with tracking information. If your tracking shows delivered but you have not received your package, please reach out to us within 48 hours.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We are here to assist you with your regimen, orders, and any inquiries regarding our formulations.

salon.title: Salon Partners
salon.heading: Elevate Your Practice.
salon.benefit1Body: Align your salon with a luxury, culturally-rooted brand. ORIGONÆ offers a prestige narrative that differentiates your service menu and attracts high-end clientele seeking intentional beauty.
salon.benefit2Body: Gain access to exclusive tiered professional pricing. Maximize your retail profitability while offering your clients the exact regimens used during their service.
salon.benefit3Body: Partners receive comprehensive product training. We provide the historical context, ingredient science, and application techniques required to deliver the true ORIGONÆ experience.
salon.circleHeading: Join The Circle of Cultural Architects.
salon.circleBody: We review every partnership inquiry meticulously to ensure alignment in luxury standards, salon aesthetics, and client experience. We invite concept salons, luxury texture specialists, and premium retailers to submit their details for consideration.
salon.applyIntro: We selectively partner with salons and stylists who share our commitment to intentional luxury and elevated botanical regimens. Please provide your details below for our wholesale team to review.
salon.activePartnerBody: Your salon partnership is active. Access your dashboard to manage wholesale orders and pricing.
